meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't scale projects (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't scale projects. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template to Scale Projects
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to scale. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to automate your freelance workflow and ship faster than ever.
content.answer_block: To scale freelance projects, stop building from scratch. Use the Antigravity project template to standardize your architecture, then pair it with Claude Code to automate repetitive boilerplate. This combination turns manual coding into a high-velocity, repeatable system, allowing you to handle more clients without increasing your development hours.
content.intro:
You’re trapped in the 'Freelancer’s Paradox': the more success you have, the less time you have to build. You spend your nights fighting architectural debt and repetitive boilerplate instead of delivering high-value features. Your project structure is a fragmented mess, and scaling feels like pushing a boulder uphill.

The shift happens when you stop being a manual laborer and start being an architect. By integrating the Antigravity template, you create a hardened foundation that handles the heavy lifting, while Claude Code acts as your tireless senior engineer. We’re moving from 'coding' to 'orchestrating'—let's reclaim your workflow.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Standardize your project structure to ensure consistency across every client engagement. This eliminates the 'where did I put that?' phase of development.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity enterprise template with Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Configure Schema Orchestration
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map your database schema directly into your Antigravity components, ensuring type safety from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a database schema for a SaaS user management system and sync it to the Antigravity project types.

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Features
steps.description: Speed up delivery by offloading the creation of authentication and profile management to your AI agent.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an authentication flow using the Antigravity Auth module, including sign-up, login, and password reset pages.

steps.title: Inject Business Logic Layers
steps.description: Use Antigravity's service-layer architecture to isolate business logic, keeping your UI clean and maintainable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer for subscription management using Stripe and link it to the existing user session provider.

steps.title: Execute Automated Integration Testing
steps.description: Ensure your project is production-ready by running an automated audit of your newly scaffolded features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run an integration test suite against all generated Antigravity modules and fix any dependency conflicts.

pro_tips: Always use atomic commits when Claude Code generates a module to allow for easy reverts if the business logic deviates.
Keep a custom 'knowledge base' file in your Antigravity root folder to guide Claude Code on your preferred coding style.
Use Claude Code's --watch flag during development to automatically update your Antigravity documentation as you build.
Pre-define your UI component library in Antigravity to prevent design drift across multiple client projects.
Treat your Antigravity template as a living product; every time you solve a complex bug, update the template to prevent it from recurring.
content.next_steps: Once your project is scaffolded, push your code to GitHub and set up a CI/CD pipeline to automate your deployments. Start by onboarding one small client project to test the velocity gains.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting manual setup kill your profit margins. Master the Antigravity workflow and scale your freelance agency to the moon. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
